title: I worked at Salesforce in an external capacity, assisting the Marketing Cloud team with user researc
pros: I worked at Salesforce in an external capacity, assisting the Marketing Cloud team with user research efforts in the spring of 2020. I was instantly drawn to the UX team's dedication to personal and professional growth, as well as their motivation to always put the user at the center of the product. The Indianapolis Salesforce office brings large tech to a smaller city and the morale in the office mimics that beautifully.

title: Worked in the HealthPlan payer space and had a great experience. Unfortunately, I was reminded of wh
pros: Worked in the HealthPlan payer space and had a great experience. Unfortunately, I was reminded of what we all know - a poor leader can change everything.

title: Good company, lots of responsibilities. Good WLB and pay
pros: Good company, lots of responsibilities. Good WLB and pay

title: Salesforce is a well oiled machine. You can tell there is real drive from Marc Benioff all the way d
pros: Salesforce is a well oiled machine. You can tell there is real drive from Marc Benioff all the way down. When it comes to social issues, Benioff is one of the few people that walks the walk and talks the talk - meaning you see a lot of diverse people in leadership positions and room to grow for everyone.

title: Wonderful and innovative company. Loves their employees and values their culture. Products are excel
pros: Wonderful and innovative company. Loves their employees and values their culture. Products are excellent and valued by clients.

title: Salesforce is an amazing place to work but that doesn't come without challenges. Expectations are in
pros: Salesforce is an amazing place to work but that doesn't come without challenges. Expectations are incredibly high and only continue to increase year over year. Pay and benefits are good, especially if you're a top performer.

title: Salesforce is a nice place to work. I enjoy the working culture there.
pros: Salesforce is a nice place to work. I enjoy the working culture there.

title: I loved my time at Salesforce. Although, it was a contract role I learned a lot about their products
pros: I loved my time at Salesforce. Although, it was a contract role I learned a lot about their products, their culture, and the recruiting function. Unfortunately, I wasn't able to get converted to full time since Covid-19 hit.

title: I spent 5 years at Salesforce and in that time witnessed phenomenal growth and hiring.   The Salesfo
pros: I spent 5 years at Salesforce and in that time witnessed phenomenal growth and hiring.   The Salesforce 1:1:1 model is what intrigued me when to join.   Salesforce in my opinion was not ready for the growth it saw at the time I was there, and as a result the many layers of management tiers resulted in a somewhat toxic culture.    They do pay well though.

title: I've worked for Salesforce for 2 years. It is a great company to work for. Friendly and nice coworke
pros: I've worked for Salesforce for 2 years. It is a great company to work for. Friendly and nice coworkers.

title: I worked for salesforce for two summers and It was just like any other tech job. As a Black man it w
pros: I worked for salesforce for two summers and It was just like any other tech job. As a Black man it was definitely awkward being in the spaces and being the only engineer but this is just like many other tech offices.The pay is good but the company does not provide lunch or breakfast for its employees which is a bummer!

title: I work for Salesforce.org, Salesforce has done a tremendous job of inspiring their employee base and
pros: I work for Salesforce.org, Salesforce has done a tremendous job of inspiring their employee base and supporting them during difficult times. As I look for my next play I will bring with me the Salesforce values that have been essential in creating a phenomenal sales organization.

title: The Business Development Associate program at Salesforce is an industry-leading, full-time selling a
pros: The Business Development Associate program at Salesforce is an industry-leading, full-time selling academy for recent graduates, providing young professionals with the hands-on sales skills and business acumen they'll need to thrive in a business development career at Salesforce and beyond. Highly recommended for those interested in technology, sales, & most importantly, the Salesforce ecosystem!

title: I have worked at salesforce now for over two years. Fantastic company with great benefits and awesom
pros: I have worked at salesforce now for over two years. Fantastic company with great benefits and awesome people to collaborate with.
